flags.description: Simulate the execution without changing state
flags.name: --dry-run

flags.description: Version of the MariaDB container image to deploy (default "11.4")
flags.name: --mariadb-version string

flags.description: Remove MariaDB and clean up Vault configurations
flags.name: -d, --disable

flags.description: Force a clean redeployment of the database
flags.name: -f, --force
